name: gb200_nvl72_nvls
_comment: NVL72 + NVLink SHARP (NVLS). Identical to gb200.72gpu but tier declares inc='nvls' with inc_alpha_us=0.2 us switch cut-through (software endpoint alpha_us=0.5 us retained for software fallback). Dispatcher routes AR/AG to INC primitives when tuner.inc_enabled (default True): single-switch star → n_alpha=2 (1 us vs ring's 2*71=142 us) + BW_eff doubled for AR. A2A stays on the crossbar ring path — NVSwitch Gen4 has no hardware A2A primitive. See documentation/explaining/collectives/03_in_network_collectives.md §2.1.
